questions.rgb_answer: The landmark is the Pantheon, which is located in Rome, Italy. This can be inferred from the Latin inscription "MAGRIFFALCOSTERTIVM FECIT," which translates to "Magrippa built this temple," referring to Marcus Agrippa, a Roman statesman and general who commissioned the construction of the Pantheon. The architectural style and the inscription are distinctive features that identify the building as the Pantheon in Rome.
